case_title: OBED GARCIA VS. PERGAMINO CAFE, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARCIA, OBED AS TO DEFENDANT PERGAMINO CAFE, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARCIA, OBED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PERGAMINO CAFE, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $5,533.38 PRINCIPAL, $185.62 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,944.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
